project_type: Next.js 16 app with React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS 4 - personal finance/budgeting app (BudgetWise)
test_framework: None configured (no test scripts or test files found)
verification_instructions: Run npm run build to verify no TypeScript or build errors. Run npm run lint for code quality checks.
environment_constraints: No test framework configured. Verification is via build and lint only.
contribution_requirements: Use responsive Tailwind CSS utility classes and ensure Semantic HTML is used for all layout sections.
key_patterns: All currency formatting goes through formatCurrency() in app/lib/utils.ts which uses Intl.NumberFormat. Dollar sign ranges appear as display strings in INCOME_RANGES and SAVINGS_TARGETS constants in multiple files. Form labels use 'Amount ($)' patterns. The AppTour component references targetId strings that map to id attributes on DOM elements in the dashboard page.
directory_structure: app/ contains the Next.js app router structure. app/lib/ has utilities (utils.ts, seed.ts, storage.ts). app/dashboard/ has the main dashboard page and sub-pages (bills, budgets, calendar, debts, income, insights, net-worth, reports, savings, settings, transactions). app/dashboard/components/ has AppTour.tsx. app/onboarding/ has the onboarding flow.
